title: 3 BHK Flat for Sale in Deshpande Nagar
description: A premium 3 BHK flat in the central Deshpande Nagar locality with a clubhouse, rooftop garden and uninterrupted city views. Walkable to markets, banks and offices — the most convenient address in Hubli.

faq.question: Is the flat Vastu compliant?
faq.answer: Yes, the layout follows Vastu principles.

faq.question: Is it loan eligible?
faq.answer: Yes, the project is approved by all major banks for home loans.

faq.question: How far is the railway station?
faq.answer: Hubballi Junction is just 1.8 km away.
